overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character exits an NCART subway station, traverses covered walkways with distinctive neon-lit moss walls, crosses open plazas surrounded by massive digital billboards, and ascends to an upper level plaza with food vendors. The environment features heavy cyberpunk aesthetics with cyan and magenta neon lighting, futuristic architecture, and dense urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART subway station interior with vending area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit station toward the exit escalator, passing vending machines and safety markings

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan and yellow sign reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit mounted on the wall
illuminated food vending machine with red and white menu display showing various food items
dark concrete industrial walls with yellow chevron safety markings and metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside an NCART subway station with dark industrial architecture and artificial lighting. The player moves toward the station exit, passing a food vending machine on the left. The environment is empty of other people, with prominent cyan and yellow NCART signage visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: escalator transition from underground to street level

events.description: ascending the escalator from the underground station toward the street exit

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator upward while facing the street exit visible at the top

entered.detail: long escalator with red illuminated edge strips and overhead fluorescent tube lighting

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a long escalator from the underground station. The environment is a narrow concrete shaft with fluorescent lighting and red illuminated safety strips on the escalator edges. The station interior elements fade from view as the camera rises toward the street level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting the station onto the street under a massive concrete overpass with green lighting
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, navigating past pedestrians and observing sparse traffic on the street

notable_agents.action: man in blue jacket and beige pants walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk
dark colored sedan driving along the street under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with green fluorescent strip lighting running along its underside
modern building facade with prominent horizontal cyan neon light strips and reflective glass windows
illuminated storefronts visible across the street under the overpass canopy

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the station, the scene opens onto a street sheltered beneath a massive concrete overpass with green fluorescent lighting. The player walks along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a blue jacket while cars drive by on the multi-lane road. A distinctive building with horizontal cyan neon lines dominates the right side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated vertical gardens and benches

events.description: entering a covered promenade with distinctive pink and purple illuminated moss walls on the right side
approaching the end of the covered walkway where brighter light from the open plaza becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered promenade passing benches with seated NPCs and illuminated plant displays on the right wall

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a red illuminated bench looking at a handheld device
pedestrian walking ahead in the covered walkway toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: vertical garden walls with dense pink and purple neon lighting, mist effects, and organic plant textures
grid of illuminated ceiling panels providing diffused white lighting throughout the covered walkway
large glass enclosures with green plants and cyan accent lighting at the walkway entrance
futuristic red illuminated benches with people sitting and resting

segments.scene_description: The player enters a distinctive covered walkway featuring vibrant pink and purple illuminated moss walls on the right side with mist effects. Red illuminated benches line the left side where NPCs sit. The ceiling features a grid of glowing panels, and the floor is scattered with newspapers and debris. The environment transitions from the street underpass to this enclosed promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by towers with massive digital billboards

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into a large open plaza with towering buildings covered in digital advertisements
looking upward to view the massive digital billboards and skyscrapers rising above the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and looking up at the towering digital advertisements and surrounding cyberpunk architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead through the plaza toward the commercial buildings

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisements on building facades including a prominent purple character poster and various commercial displays
tall futuristic buildings with glass and steel construction rising high above the plaza level
elevated pedestrian walkway or bridge connecting buildings across the open plaza space

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive glowing digital billboards. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the advertisements and architecture. The environment shifts from the enclosed moss walkway to this open, cathedral-like space of commerce and neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with storefronts and outdoor seating areas

events.description: entering a narrower commercial street with ground-level shops including Gala Studios and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and outdoor seating areas, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person leaning against a red railing looking at their phone
pedestrian with distinctive blue hair walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated yellow Gala Studios signage and green neon accent lighting
red illuminated railing with people leaning and sitting along the elevated seating area
building with rainbow-colored illuminated glass panels creating a prismatic effect

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open plaza into a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts. The Gala Studios sign with yellow neon lettering is prominent on the left, while a building with rainbow-colored glass panels stands on the right. Pedestrians populate the walkway, some leaning against red illuminated railings at an outdoor seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level plaza with food vendor and concrete architecture

events.description: beginning to ascend a wide set of concrete stairs marked with orange safety lines
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper plaza with a prominent red food vendor stall

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs and emerging onto an upper plaza with a food vendor and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the concrete stairs to the left side
vendor or customer standing near the Zhiro's food stall counter

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with orange edge markings and graffiti on the side walls
red and orange food vendor booth with illuminated signage, menu displays, and a phoenix logo
illuminated white sign showing number 05 mounted on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending a wide concrete staircase marked with orange safety lines and graffiti. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into an upper plaza featuring Zhiro's food stall, a prominent red and orange vendor booth with bright signage. The area has a more industrial feel with concrete architecture and scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the industrial depths of a subway station into a vibrant, neon-lit urban promenade. It begins within the dark, artificial lighting of an NCART station, moving past a food vending machine toward cyan and yellow signage. As the camera ascends a long escalator, the industrial interior fades away, replaced by the fluorescent glow and red safety strips of a narrow concrete shaft. The scene then opens onto a street sheltered beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the lighting shifts to green fluorescence and the view expands to include passing cars and a building defined by horizontal cyan neon lines. Finally, the camera transitions from the open street into an enclosed walkway, where the environment transforms into a lush cyberpunk corridor featuring mist-covered pink and purple moss walls and glowing ceiling panels.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed walkway into a sprawling neon metropolis that eventually ascends to an elevated urban plaza. It begins by emerging from a mossy corridor into a vast, cathedral-like plaza, where the camera pans upward to capture the overwhelming scale of towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards. As the player moves forward, the open space narrows into a commercial street lined with vibrant storefronts, passing the yellow neon of Gala Studios and rainbow-colored glass panels while pedestrians linger by red illuminated railings. The scene then shifts toward a wide concrete staircase marked with orange safety lines and graffiti, which the camera climbs to reach a higher level. Finally, the environment opens into an upper industrial plaza featuring the bright red and orange signage of Zhiro's food stall amidst a concrete landscape.
